tags.name: `mc-theme-switch`
tags.description:
Purpose: A button that allows the user to switch between light and dark themes.
Category: Layout, Content Display
When to use: When you need to provide a way for users to toggle between light and dark themes.
When not to use: When the application only supports a single theme.
Works with components: mc-top-bar
Alternative component names: Theme Toggle, Dark Mode Switch, Light/Dark Mode Toggle
Extra notes: Implementation additional step: this component requires that the application has two stylesheets linked in the document head with the following attributes: <link rel="stylesheet" href="path/to/light-theme.css" media="prefers-color-scheme: light"> or <link rel="stylesheet" href="path/to/dark-theme.css" media="prefers-color-scheme: dark">

Events:

  * `change` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Fired when the theme is changed.

Attributes:

  * `fit` {Fit} - The fit of the component.

Properties:

  * `LSThemeCategory` {`string`} - 

  * `LSThemeKey` {`string`} - 

  * `styleLight` {`HTMLLinkElement`} - 

  * `styleDark` {`HTMLLinkElement`} - 

  * `browserScheme` {`ThemeOptions`} - 

  * `nextTheme` {`ThemeOptions`} - 

  * `icon` {`"moon" | "sun"`} - 

  * `label` {`string`} - 

  * `fit` {Fit} - The fit of the component.

  * `theme` {`ThemeOptions`} - 

  * `change` - The change event of the component.

attributes.name: fit
attributes.description:
`fit` {Fit} - The fit of the component.

Property: fit

Default: medium

attributes.name: onchange
attributes.description: `change` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Fired when the theme is changed.
